news.title:
RBI approves RBL Bank's capital clause change, raising authorized capital to ₹18 bn.
The increase involves issuing 80 mn new shares by RBL Bank.
news.summary:
RBI approves RBL Bank's capital clause change, raising authorized capital to ₹18 bn.
The increase involves issuing 80 mn new shares by RBL Bank.

news.title:
RBL Bank gets RBI nod to amend its capital clause, increasing authorized capital to ₹18B.
The amendment involves creating 80M new shares, boosting RBL Bank's capital structure.
news.summary:
RBL Bank gets RBI nod to amend its capital clause, increasing authorized capital to ₹18B.
The amendment involves creating 80M new shares, boosting RBL Bank's capital structure.

news.title:
RBL Bank's valuation has shifted to 'very expensive' due to rising share price and elevated P/E, P/B ratios.
Investors should weigh RBL Bank's premium valuation against its financial performance and peer comparisons.
news.summary:
RBL Bank's valuation has shifted to 'very expensive' due to rising share price and elevated P/E, P/B ratios.
Investors should weigh RBL Bank's premium valuation against its financial performance and peer comparisons.

news.title:
RBL Bank and AU Small Finance Bank showed strong advances and deposits growth, per Motilal Oswal.
RBL shares rose 5.7%, AU Small Finance Bank by 0.4%; tighter liquidity pressures margins.
news.summary:
RBL Bank and AU Small Finance Bank showed strong advances and deposits growth, per Motilal Oswal.
RBL shares rose 5.7%, AU Small Finance Bank by 0.4%; tighter liquidity pressures margins.

news.title:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.

news.title:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.
news.summary:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.

news.title:
Citi advises buying RBL Bank, sets a target price of ₹390/share.
RBL's retail growth driven by secured loans up 36% YoY; CASA ratio at 33.6%.
news.summary:
Citi advises buying RBL Bank, sets a target price of ₹390/share.
RBL's retail growth driven by secured loans up 36% YoY; CASA ratio at 33.6%.

news.title:
PNB reports 10.8% YoY global business growth; CASA ratio at 73.7%. RBL Bank sees 24% YoY business rise; RBI approves 74% stake sale to Emirates NBD.
Tata Motors PV Q4 wholesales drop 14.5% YoY; RVNL secures ₹242 crore order. Emami to fully acquire Axiom Ayurveda for ₹200 crore.
news.summary:
PNB reports 10.8% YoY global business growth; CASA ratio at 73.7%. RBL Bank sees 24% YoY business rise; RBI approves 74% stake sale to Emirates NBD.
Tata Motors PV Q4 wholesales drop 14.5% YoY; RVNL secures ₹242 crore order. Emami to fully acquire Axiom Ayurveda for ₹200 crore.

news.title:
RBL Bank sees breakout with higher highs and lows; RSI above 50.
MACD bullish crossover with supportive volume indicates positive momentum.
news.summary:
RBL Bank sees breakout with higher highs and lows; RSI above 50.
MACD bullish crossover with supportive volume indicates positive momentum.

news.title:
RBL Bank's FY26 business surpassed ₹2.5L Cr; deposits rose 25% YoY to ₹1.39L Cr.
Advances grew 22% to ₹1.15L Cr, LCR stood at 130%, and JLG collections reached 99.7%.
news.summary:
RBL Bank's FY26 business surpassed ₹2.5L Cr; deposits rose 25% YoY to ₹1.39L Cr.
Advances grew 22% to ₹1.15L Cr, LCR stood at 130%, and JLG collections reached 99.7%.

news.title:
Emirates NBD secures RBI approval for up to 74% stake in RBL Bank.
RBL Bank must amend Articles of Association and gain RBI approval.
news.summary:
Emirates NBD secures RBI approval for up to 74% stake in RBL Bank.
RBL Bank must amend Articles of Association and gain RBI approval.

news.title:
RBL Bank's gross advances rose to ₹1.15T from ₹948B YoY.
Total deposits increased to ₹1.4T from ₹1.1T, showing strong growth.
news.summary:
RBL Bank's gross advances rose to ₹1.15T from ₹948B YoY.
Total deposits increased to ₹1.4T from ₹1.1T, showing strong growth.

news.title:
RBL Bank sees 11.3% rise in derivatives open interest, indicating active trading.
Despite higher activity, RBL Bank underperformed its sector and broader indices.
news.summary:
RBL Bank sees 11.3% rise in derivatives open interest, indicating active trading.
Despite higher activity, RBL Bank underperformed its sector and broader indices.

news.title:
RBI approves RBL Bank's deal with Emirates NDB, sources confirm.
RBL Bank's board is set to meet today regarding the deal.
news.summary:
RBI approves RBL Bank's deal with Emirates NDB, sources confirm.
RBL Bank's board is set to meet today regarding the deal.

news.title:
RBI approves Emirates NBD's 60% stake acquisition in RBL Bank for ₹26,850 crore.
Acquisition via preferential issue at ₹280/share; RBL Bank board meets today for disclosure.
news.summary:
RBI approves Emirates NBD's 60% stake acquisition in RBL Bank for ₹26,850 crore.
Acquisition via preferential issue at ₹280/share; RBL Bank board meets today for disclosure.

news.title:
RBL Bank secures RBI approval for its stake acquisition deal with Emirates NBD.
Sebi approval for the proposed deal is still awaited, per sources.
news.summary:
RBL Bank secures RBI approval for its stake acquisition deal with Emirates NBD.
Sebi approval for the proposed deal is still awaited, per sources.

news.title: RBL Bank gets RBI approval for partnership with Emirates NBD.
news.summary: RBL Bank gets RBI approval for partnership with Emirates NBD.

news.title:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.
news.summary:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.

news.title:
UAE Central Bank approves Emirates NBD's majority stake acquisition in RBL Bank.
Amalgamation of Emirates NBD's India operations into RBL Bank awaits regulatory approvals.
news.summary:
UAE Central Bank approves Emirates NBD's majority stake acquisition in RBL Bank.
Amalgamation of Emirates NBD's India operations into RBL Bank awaits regulatory approvals.

news.title:
RBL Bank faced a GST demand of ₹92 crore for FY20, later fully withdrawn.
The withdrawal, under Section 74 of Maharashtra GST Act, was disclosed per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
RBL Bank faced a GST demand of ₹92 crore for FY20, later fully withdrawn.
The withdrawal, under Section 74 of Maharashtra GST Act, was disclosed per SEBI norms.
